text: I find myself straddling the line between sterile glass walls and a vivid showcase of intellect and curiosity. The transition from the quiet formality of an empty meeting room to the playful, thought-provoking space dedicated to R+D stirs in me a sense of possibility. Here, the world feels both constructed and improvised—each setting an invitation to reflect on how spaces shape our thinking, our learning, and our capacity for awe. I feel awake and intrigued, eager to engage with the questions this place throws into the air.
